mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(PAY_SEQ) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) AS totalAmt FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq} AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE'
SELECT * FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq} AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' ORDER BY PAY_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DONATION_PAYMENT (ORDER_ID, MBR_SEQ, PAY_TYPE, PAY_AMT, PAY_STATUS, CHEER_MSG, REG_DT, REGULAR_ROUND) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{mbrSeq}, #{payType}, #{payAmt}, 'WAIT', #{cheerMsg}, NOW(), 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_DONATION_PAYMENT SET PAY_STATUS = #{payStatus}, PAY_METHOD = #{payMethod}, PAYMENT_KEY = #{paymentKey}, PAY_DT = NOW() WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
